_provenance: Claude-authored original passages (DeepSeek not used). Zhongkao-level 语法填空 (gblanks shape, 10 blanks): simple tense, plurals, articles, prepositions, comparatives/superlatives, non-finite, connectors. Level tagged 1.

sets.passage: My name is Daniel, and I (1)____ (live) in a small town with my family. Every morning, my sister and I (2)____ (walk) to school together, and it takes us about twenty (3)____ (minute). Our school is not big, but it has (4)____ beautiful garden. In spring, the flowers there are even (5)____ (colourful) than the ones in the park. My favourite subject is science, (6)____ I find experiments exciting. Last week, our teacher (7)____ (show) us how plants drink water. It was (8)____ interesting that the whole class clapped. After school, I often help my mother (9)____ (cook) dinner. I really think my town is a wonderful place (10)____ (grow) up.
sets.explain_zh: (1) 一般现在 live；(2) we walk；(3) twenty minutes 复数；(4) a beautiful garden；(5) colourful 比较级 more colourful；(6) 原因 because；(7) last week 过去 showed；(8) so...that；(9) help sb (to) do → cook；(10) a place to grow up。

sets.passage: Last Sunday, my friends and I (1)____ (visit) a science museum in the city. We (2)____ (be) very excited because it was our first time there. The museum was much (3)____ (big) than I had imagined, and there were hundreds of (4)____ (machine) that we could touch and try. My favourite one taught us how (5)____ (make) electricity by riding a bike: when you pedalled faster, the light became (6)____ (bright). I also learned a lot (7)____ space and stars, and a kind guide answered all (8)____ questions patiently. We stayed there (9)____ four hours and did not want to leave. It was one of the (10)____ (good) days of my whole holiday.

gblanks.hint: past tense of be, subject we

sets.explain_zh: (1) 过去 visited；(2) we were；(3) big 比较级 bigger；(4) hundreds of machines 复数；(5) how to make；(6) bright 比较级 brighter；(7) learn a lot about；(8) all our questions；(9) for four hours；(10) one of the best days 最高级。
